title: carex lacustris
intro: Carex lacustris, also known as lake sedge, is a perennial aquatic grass-like plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Carex lacustris include reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Carex lacustris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
